title: oryzopsis miliacea var. thomasii
intro: Oryzopsis miliacea var. thomasii, also known as Thomas's rice grass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thomas's rice grass include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Thomas's rice grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
